title: Casing for automated handling of a bottle
abstract: The invention proposes a casing (30) for handling a container (10) comprising a cylindrical bottle (12) closed by a stopper (14), the casing (30) comprising an open upper surface for the introduction and storing of the container (10) in a supine storage position in the casing (30), and means to hold the container (10) comprising an elastically deformable clamp (44, 52), that interacts with the stopper (14) of the container (10). The elastically deformable clamp has an axial clamping effect on the stopper (14), that interacts with facing portions of the two opposite transverse faces (22, 28) of the stopper (14).
claims:
Claims 1. A casing (30) for handling, by means of robot arm gripper, and/or for the storage/shelving of a container (10) comprising a an axially oriented body made of rigid or semi-rigid material, closed by a stopper (14) at one of its axial end, the said casing (30) comprising: - a horizontal bottom wall (40) that can rest on a surface; - an open upper surface allowing for introduction and accommodation of a container (10) in a supine and storage position inside the casing (30); - means for holding the container (10) in a storage position inside the casing (30) comprising an elastically deformable clamp that interacts with an associated portion of the container (10), characterised in that the elastically deformable clamp of the retention means is a clamp with an axial clamping effect of the stopper and that has a pair of opposing jaws, including: - a first jaw that is a first vertical plate (44, 45) of the casing (30), that interacts with a facing portion of a full end face (22) of the stopper (14); and - a second jaw (52, 54) that is a second vertical plate (52, 54) of the casing (30), parallel to the first plate, that interacts with a facing portion of an annular end face (24, 28) of the stopper (14), and that comprises a concave contour cut (58) that, when the container (10) is in the storage position inside the casing (30), is open to receive at least part of an axial section (13) of the body (12) of the container (10) adjacent to the stopper (14). 2. A casing (30) according to Claim 1, characterised in that the second vertical plate (52, 54) forming the jaw comprises surface portions (70) that are inclined relative to the plane of the plate (52, 54), and that constitute portions for guiding the stopper (14) into the clamp when the container (10) is being introduced into the casing (30). 3. A casing (30) according to Claim 2, characterised in that each inclined surface portion (70) is delimited by a section of the contour of the cut, that serves as a guiding bevel when the said axial section (13) of the body (12) of the container (10) is introduced into the said . 4. A casing according to anyone of the preceding Claims, characterised in that the casing (30) delimitates a watertight inner lower cavity. 5. A casing (30) according to Claim 4, characterised in that the casing (30) is axially delimited by two transverse opposite end walls (44, 46), and transversely by two axially opposite walls (42), that extend vertically upwards; 6. A casing (30) according the Claim 5, characterised in that the said first plate (44) is a part of one (44) of the two transverse opposite end walls (44, 46), and in that the said second plate (52) is an inner transverse partition wall (52) of the casing (30). 7. A casing (30) according to Claim 5, characterised in that the said opposite end transverse walls and opposite axial walls (44, 46) are delimited by coplanar free upper edges (48). 8. A casing according to any of the previous Claims characterised in that it comprises a horizontal upper wall portion (50). 9. A casing (30) according to any of the previous Claims characterised in that it is made of plastic by a one-piece moulding process. 10. An assembly comprising: - a container (10) comprising an axially oriented body made of rigid or semi-rigid material, closed by a stopper (14) at one of its axial ends; and - a casing (30) for handling, by means of a robot arm gripper, and/or for storage/shelving of the said container (10), said casing (30) comprising: 

 -- a horizontal bottom wall (40) that can rest on a surface; -- an open upper surface allowing for introduction and accommodation of a container (10) in a supine and storage position inside the casing (30); -- means for holding the container (10) in a storage position inside the casing (30) comprising an elastically deformable clamp having an axial clamping effect that interacts with an associated portion of the container (10). 11. An assembly according to Claim 10, characterised in that the said clamp with an axial clamping effect interacts with facing portions of two opposite transverse faces (22, 24, 28) of the stopper (14). 12. An assembly according to Claim 11, characterised in that the clamp with an axial clamping effect has a pair of opposing jaws (44, 45), including a first jaw that interacts with a facing portion of a full end face (22) of the stopper (14) and a second jaw (52, 54) that interacts with a facing portion of an annular end face (24, 28) of the stopper (14). 13. An assembly according to any of Claims 10 to 12, characterised in that the casing (30) delimitates a watertight inner lower cavity.
